headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录141篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究73篇, 模型发布31篇, 开源项目25篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（37篇）。其中9%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ tinyhumansai /openhuman：Your Personal AI super intelligence. Private, Simple and extremely powerful.

▸ HKUDS /CLI-Anything："CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub:https://clianything.cc/

▸ K-Dense-AI /scientific-agent-skills：A set of ready to use Agent Skills for research, science, engineering, analysis, finance and writing

▸ ggml-org /llama.cpp：LLM inference in C/C++

▸ tech-leads-club /agent-skills：The secure, validated skill registry for professional AI coding agents. Extend Antigravity, Claude C
text: 今日共收录141篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究73篇, 模型发布31篇, 开源项目25篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（37篇）。其中9%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
